# Briefly
// What the feature is, in a sentence


# Details
// Specific requirements, designs, relevant existing patterns to follow


# Acceptance Criteria
// Testable statements of correct behaviour. Use whatever's shortest and unambiguous:
//   - a terse assertion when the action has one correct outcome
//   - Given/When/Then only when state changes what "correct" means
// Shared setup lives in Details, not repeated here. Criteria can span lines.
// - [ ] Recursive wiki-links don't open a nested peek
// - [ ] ...


# Out of Scope
// What this ticket deliberately doesn't cover — sets up clean follow-ups
